dialogos.texto_en: Nino, hold on tight!\nIt's dangerous!
I know! It's okay,\nI've ridden many times with you before.
But today we're on an unfamiliar road.\nPlus, we're riding a rental bike,\nwith different handling.
Hey, come on, don't say things that'll scare me.\nPlease drive safely.
Don't worry, I'll drive as carefully as a white knight \nrides his steel horse.
Teehee, what's that supposed to mean?
Ah...\nThe hell I'm sayin! I'm such a dork!
Don't say weird things,\nfocus on driving. Don't drop the princess, okay?
Okay.
...I love your scent, Futaro.
Huh? What?
Nothing.
(I never expected him to show up on a bike.\n It's too unexpected.)
(I've always wanted to ride with him\n and see the scenery of Okinawa...\n but I never thought it would happen here.)
Hey, Futaro? Why did you suddenly bring a bike?
You said you wanted to take a ride on Kouri Island\nbefore, right? You really wanted to do this, didn't you?
Huh...?
Last night, I found a place where I could rent a bike.\nSorry I didn't realize it before.
It's too late for apologizing now.
But it's okay.\nAt least you noticed the place.
So, are we going to Kouri Island now?
No, our destination is different.
Huh? Where are we going?\nThere's hardly any view better than that bridge, right?
Who knows?\nBut now it's my turn to lead the way.\nBetter look forward to it.
Okay, I understand.\nI'll leave everything to you, Futaro.
(Come to think of it,\n whenever I ride a motorcycle with Futaro,\n something unexpected always happens.)
(The first time was in our second year,\n after final exams, when I confessed my feelings\n to him.)
(I still don't know why I said it all of a sudden,\n and on top of that,\n Futaro said he didn't hear it.)
I love you.
Hehe!\nI guess I wanted a bit more of an atmosphere after all.
Hm? What's wrong?
No, nothing.
(On the night we kissed at the school festival...)
(I still believe\n that love is something you have to go after.)
(Even if I don't get any response...\n I'll keep pushing forward.)
(I can only be together with Futaro like this because\n I've always done things my way.)
(Hey, Futaro?\n You're the one who taught me what true love is.)
(And you said you'd show me a new world, didn't you?)
(So, what are you going to teach me today?\n What are you going to show me...?)
